description: Estimate a simultaneous equations model (SEM) for the truffle market using Three-Stage Least Squares (3SLS) on the `truffles.gdt` dataset. The model consists of a Demand equation where quantity `q` depends on `const`, price `p`, price of substitute `ps`, and disposable income `di`, and a Supply equation where `q` depends on `const`, `p`, and price of factor of production `pf`. Save the full estimation output to `/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/truffles_3sls_results.txt`.
